notes: gary v4 preview: Stable Audio 3 is now available in the Jerry tab on the remote backend.
SA3 includes generate, loop, transform, continue, seed recall, key/scale prompting, LoRA sliders, and smart dice.
SA3 is remote-only while gary4local support is still in progress.
Override GARY4JUCE_UPDATE_MANIFEST_URL to point a local build at this feed.
Close your DAW before replacing plugin files with a downloaded update.
